full_text:
The sample was minced into small pieces and dissociated using Dispase (the new orange one).

Dispase dissociation media included 9,7 ml DMEM/F12+++ (DMEM/F12 supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and 1% pen/strep) + 200 µl Dispase + 100 µl DNAse. Incubated at 37C rotating for 30 min, vortexed before and after. Filtered through 70 µm cell strainer.

Dispase dissociated cells:

RBC lysis with 5 ml for 5 min + 20 ml DMEM/F12+++. The final pellet was resuspended in 3 mL of DMEM/F12+++ media.

Cell counts:

B) Biobanking

Dispase dissociated cells: 3x 1.225x10^6 cells

Cells were frozen in 1mL of STEM-CellBanker

1) | total [E6 cells/ml] | 7.36
 | live [E6 cells/ml] | 1.31
 | viability [%] | 17.9
 | size [µm] | 8.9

Average | [cells/ml] | 1.225x10^6
